flows.name: Login - valid credentials (super admin)
steps: Navigate to baseUrl
Fill email and password from superAdmin account
Click Sign In
Verify redirect away from login screen (no longer see 'Sign In' button)
Verify no console errors

flows.name: Login - wrong password
steps: Navigate to baseUrl
Fill email correctly but use 'wrongpass123' as password
Click Sign In
Verify error message appears in the red error box
Verify user stays on login screen

flows.name: Login - empty fields
steps: Navigate to baseUrl
Click Sign In without entering email or password
Verify form validation (no crash, sensible feedback)

flows.name: Login - Enter key submission
steps: Navigate to baseUrl
Fill email, fill password, press Enter in the password field
Verify login proceeds the same as clicking the button

flows.name: Apply for Admission link
steps: Navigate to baseUrl
Click 'Apply for Admission' button
Verify navigation to /apply page loads without console errors

flows.name: Sidebar navigation - super admin
steps: Login as admin

Click each sidebar menu item one by one (Dashboard, Students, Lecturers, Modules, Classes, Admissions, Attendance, Assignments, Exams, Grades, Results, Timetable, Notes, Reports, Notifications, User Management, Config, HR)
For each page: wait 2 seconds, screenshot, capture any console errors, note if page is blank or shows error UI

flows.name: Sidebar navigation - lecturer
steps: Login as lecturer
Click each visible sidebar item (My Modules, My Students, Attendance, Grades, etc.)
Verify lecturer-only pages load and admin-only pages are hidden or blocked

flows.name: Sidebar navigation - student
steps: Login as student
Click each visible sidebar item (Dashboard, Modules, Grades, Transcripts, Timetable, Profile, etc.)
Verify student-only pages load; admin/lecturer pages must not be accessible

flows.name: Logout
steps: Login as superAdmin
Find and click the logout button (usually in profile menu or sidebar)
Verify return to login screen
Try clicking browser back - should NOT regain access to authenticated pages

flows.name: Refresh mid-session
steps: Login as admin
Navigate to Students page
Hard refresh the page (F5)
Verify session persists and page reloads correctly

flows.name: Public applicant flow
steps: Navigate to baseUrl/apply
Verify the public application page loads
Try filling and submitting with empty required fields - verify validation
Do NOT submit a real application (skip the final submit)

flows.name: HR module - Employees list
steps: Login as admin
Navigate to HR section, then Employees
Verify the table renders without errors
Try sorting/filtering if controls exist
Open one employee detail page - verify no crash

flows.name: HR - Create test employee (writes real record)
steps: Login as hr (account 'hr' from testAccounts). If hr cannot see an 'Add Employee' button on the Employees page (missing 'employees:write' permission), log out and retry as superAdmin instead.
Navigate to HR Management → Employees → Employees (the employees list page)
Click the 'Add Employee' button at the top right (has user-plus icon and blue background)
Wait for the 'New Employee' form to load. The 'Employee Code *' field should auto-fill with the next available code (e.g. EMP-0040)
Compute a unique timestamp marker using the current time, format: YYYYMMDD_HHmm (e.g. 20260518_1430)
Fill 'Full Name *' with: ZZZ_QA_TEST_<timestamp>   (the ZZZ prefix sorts it to the bottom of any sorted list for easy identification)
Fill 'Job Title' with: QA Test Position - SAFE TO DELETE
Fill 'Email' with: qa-test-<timestamp>@qatest.local
Fill 'Mobile Number' with: +12345678900
Fill 'Basic Salary' with: 0
If a 'Status' field is present, set it to 'inactive' so this record does not inflate active counts or payroll estimates
Fill 'Joining Date' with today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Leave other optional fields (bank, department, manager) empty - only Full Name and Employee Code are required per the source code
Click the blue 'Save' button at the top right of the form (has floppy-disk icon)
Verify a success toast appears reading 'Employee created' AND the page redirects back to the Employees list
On the Employees list, search for the timestamp marker and verify the new employee appears in the table

In the report, prominently list under a 'Created records (for manual cleanup)' section: the full name (ZZZ_QA_TEST_<timestamp>), the assigned employee_code, and the SQL to delete it: DELETE FROM employees WHERE employee_code = '<code>';
Capture any console errors or network 4xx/5xx that fire during save. RLS errors (code 42501) indicate the account lacks permission - report and stop, do not retry indefinitely.
Do NOT attempt to delete the record - skipAreas forbids deletion. The user will clean it up manually.

skipAreas: Do not submit the public Apply for Admission form (creates real applicant records)
Do not delete any students, lecturers, employees, modules, or classes
Do not change passwords or email addresses on any user
Do not modify HR payroll, salary, or contract data
Do not send notifications or emails
Do not export/download PDFs unless explicitly testing that feature
watchFor: Console errors (red messages in browser devtools)
Blank pages where content should appear
Layout breaking (overflowing text, overlapping elements, off-screen content)
Slow responses (>3 seconds for navigation or button clicks)
Forms that allow obviously invalid input (negative ages, future dates of birth, etc.)
